title: Disclaimer
metaDescription: Read the ConvertBase.app disclaimer about tool outputs, informational content, cookies, analytics and advertising.
heading: Disclaimer
content: ConvertBase.app provides general informational content and practical online tools for convenience.
Tool results and explanations are provided in good faith, but they should not be treated as legal, financial, medical or other regulated professional advice.

sections.title: Tool outputs and accuracy
paragraphs: We aim to make outputs useful and consistent, but results can vary depending on inputs, edge cases, browser behavior or changes in standards.
Users should independently verify any result before relying on it for important personal, technical or business decisions.

sections.title: Third-party services
paragraphs: ConvertBase.app may use third-party services such as Google Analytics and Google AdSense. Those services may use cookies or related technologies as described in our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.
We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices or policies of third-party websites or services linked from this platform.

sections.title: Use at your own discretion
paragraphs: By using this platform, you accept that the service is provided as-is and at your own discretion.
For policy or compliance questions, contact contact@convertbase.app.
